executives.name: Nikesh Arora
executives.background: Nikesh Arora has served as our Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of our Board since June 2018. Prior to joining us, Mr. Arora served as President and Chief Operating Officer of SoftBank Group Corp. from October 2014 to June 2016. From 2004 to 2014, Mr. Arora held various positions at Google Inc., most recently as Senior Vice President and Chief Business Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of the Board

executives.name: Dipak Golechha
executives.background: Dipak Golechha has served as our Chief Financial Officer since March 2021. Prior to joining us, Mr. Golechha served as President of Palo Alto Networks from December 2020 to March 2021. Previously, he was CEO of Excelitas Technologies Corp. and held various executive roles at Procter & Gamble.

executives.name: Nir Zuk
executives.background: Nir Zuk is one of our founders and has served as our Chief Technology Officer and a member of our Board since March 2005. Prior to founding Palo Alto Networks, Mr. Zuk was Chief Technology Officer at NetScreen Technologies and was a principal engineer at Check Point Software Technologies.

executives.name: Lee Klarich
executives.background: Lee Klarich has served as our Chief Product Officer since August 2017. He joined us in May 2006 and has served in various product management roles, including Executive Vice President, Product Management.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Product and Technology Officer (CPTO) and Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Aparna Bawa
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer of Zoom Video Communications, Inc. She joined our board in May 2021.

executives.name: Helene Gayle
executives.background: President of Spelman College. Former CEO of The Chicago Community Trust and CARE USA.

executives.name: James Goetz
executives.background: James J. Goetz has been a director since 2019. He is a Partner at Sequoia Capital, a venture capital firm, which he joined in 2004. He previously held leadership positions at Entrust and VitalSigns Software.

executives.name: John Donovan
executives.background: Former CEO of AT&T Communications, LLC. He has served on our board since September 2021.

executives.name: Lorraine Twohill
executives.background: Chief Marketing Officer at Google LLC. She joined our board in April 2019.

executives.name: Mark Anderson
executives.background: Mark Anderson has served as a member of our board of directors since August 2020. Mr. Anderson has served as President, Revenue of Palo Alto Networks, Inc. since January 2024. Previously, he served as Chief Executive Officer of Alteryx, Inc. from October 2020 to March 2024. He also served as President of Palo Alto Networks from 2016 to 2018.

executives.name: Mark McLaughlin
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Palo Alto Networks. Former CEO of Verisign.

executives.name: Mary Pat McCarthy
executives.background: Ms. McCarthy was a Vice Chair at KPMG LLP and has extensive experience in audit and risk management.
